description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a matte black exterior and a slightly reflective, dark-tinted front door. The front panel features a digital control interface on the right side, including a display and several tactile buttons arranged in a grid, with clear labeling for time and function settings. The door occupies most of the front face and appears to have a semi-glossy, possibly glass window, though it is heavily tinted and not fully transparent. The sides and top are plain, with a small rectangular vent visible on both the left and right panels, likely for heat dissipation. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with subtle branding located beneath the control panel. The microwave is likely constructed from metal and plastic, with a glass window and an interior cavity for heating food.
description: A modern, black microwave oven with a digital control panel and a dark-tinted front door, featuring side vents and subtle branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, dark-tinted door, digital control panel with buttons and display on the right, and a small brand logo below the panel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a small rectangular vent near the center of the panel, with the rest of the surface being plain and matte.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly featureless, flat surface with a faintly visible pattern, likely the back of the microwave's cavity.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a small rectangular vent and a plain matte finish.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white brand logo is present below the control panel on the lower right front face. It is rectangular and unobtrusive.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a grid of tactile buttons with clear icons and numbers. The panel is compact and well-organized.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated along the bottom edge of the front door, forming a subtle horizontal groove for gripping. It is made of the same material as the door frame and is minimally protrusive.
attribute_vent_placement: Small, rectangular vents are located on both the left and right side panels, centered horizontally and vertically. No vents are visible on the top or rear surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, dark-tinted, semi-transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
